name: Byrdonis Nest
description: An abandoned egg after a beast chases off an injured Green Byrd.

choices.outcome: Add Byrdonis Egg quest card to Deck
choices.recommendation: RECOMMENDED — the quest card provides strong long-term value
Safe pick if you don't want to manage a quest card

notes: The quest card route can be very rewarding. The +7 Max HP is a reliable alternative.

name: Dense Vegetation
description: Lost in thick jungle undergrowth; exhaustion and dread accompany the dense overgrowth.

choices.recommendation: Take if your deck can handle a combat encounter

choices.outcome: Remove a card from Deck; lose 11 HP
choices.recommendation: Good for deck thinning if you can afford the HP

notes: Overgrowth event. Trade-off between healing (with combat risk) and card removal (with HP cost).

name: Infested Automaton
description: A lone automaton with glowing core engulfed by organic growth in a chamber of dead robots.

choices.recommendation: Good if you need scaling — Power cards provide lasting effects
Good for energy-efficient decks or combo strategies

notes: Act 2 event. Both options give a free card with no downside.

name: Jungle Maze Adventure
description: Ragtag adventurers offer partnership navigating a deadly maze with guardian traps.

choices.recommendation: Safe option with guaranteed gold
High reward if you can afford the HP — triple the gold

notes: Overgrowth event. Classic risk/reward — solo pays 3x but costs significant HP.

name: Neow's Blessing
description: Starting event. Neow offers blessings at the start of each run based on your previous performance.

choices.outcome: May grant relic, cards, gold, Max HP, card removal, or card transform
choices.recommendation: Boss relic swap and rare card options are generally strongest

notes: Always appears at the start. Options improve based on how far you reached in your previous run. Choose based on your character and planned archetype.

name: Potion Courier
description: A deceased courier with ransacked belongings and an unclaimed batch of Foul Potions.

choices.recommendation: Good if you have potion slots and want quantity
Better quality — 1 Uncommon potion is often more valuable than 3 Foul

notes: Shared event in Acts 2-3. Quantity vs quality potion choice.

name: Room Full Of Cheese
description: A chamber entirely constructed of cheese — walls, furniture, candles, and even the door.

choices.outcome: Select 2 of 8 random Common cards for your Deck
choices.recommendation: Good for deck building early — pick cards that fit your archetype

choices.outcome: Lose 14 HP; obtain the Chosen Cheese relic
choices.recommendation: Take if you can afford the HP — the relic provides lasting value

notes: Overgrowth event. Gorge is safe card gain; Search costs HP but gives a relic.

name: Sapphire Seed
description: A rare, extinct blue seed offering health amplification or cultivation possibilities.

choices.outcome: Heal 9 HP; upgrade a card in your Deck
choices.recommendation: RECOMMENDED — healing plus a free upgrade is excellent value
Niche — only if the Sown enchantment fits your strategy

notes: Overgrowth event. Consume is usually the better choice for the heal + upgrade combo.

name: Slippery Bridge
description: Massive gusts of wind buffet you on a rickety bridge, threatening to end your journey.

choices.outcome: Lose 3 HP; a random card is removed from Deck
choices.recommendation: Take if you're okay with random card loss — the HP cost is small

choices.outcome: Remove a random card from Deck
choices.recommendation: Free card removal — generally the better option

notes: Shared event across all acts. Forced card removal with no way to skip. Overcome is usually better since it costs no HP.

name: Spirit Grafter
description: A cocoon ignites, releasing a Spirit Grafter attempting to merge with your being.

choices.outcome: Heal 25 HP; add Metamorphosis to Deck
choices.recommendation: Great if you need healing — 25 HP is very significant

choices.outcome: Lose 9 HP; remove a card from Deck
choices.recommendation: Good for deck thinning if your HP can handle it

notes: Trade-off between large heal (with a card added) and card removal (with HP cost).

name: Tea Master
description: A peaceful shack with premium-priced tea selections offering combat benefits.

choices.outcome: Pay 50 Gold; upgrade your starting hand next combat
choices.recommendation: Cheap option — good if you have key cards to upgrade

choices.outcome: Pay 150 Gold; gain 2 Strength at start of next 5 combats
choices.recommendation: Expensive but powerful — 2 Strength for 5 fights is excellent scaling

choices.outcome: Shuffle 2 Dazed into Draw Pile next combat
choices.recommendation: Negative option — only if you have Dazed synergies or no gold

notes: Act 2 event. Ember Tea is very strong if you can afford it. Tea of Discourtesy is a trap for most builds.

name: Tezcatara
description: Ancient being offering a deal — power at a price.

choices.outcome: Gain a powerful effect at a cost (HP, gold, or curse)
choices.recommendation: Evaluate the specific trade-off carefully before accepting
Safe if the cost is too steep for your current run

notes: Overgrowth event. The deal varies — weigh the benefit against the cost based on your run state.

name: This Or That
description: Arms emerge from a hole offering a bag of riches or a cursed relic.

choices.recommendation: Safe gold gain — good if you need money for shops

choices.outcome: Add Clumsy curse to Deck; obtain a random Relic
choices.recommendation: Higher risk/reward — a relic is powerful but the curse hurts consistency

notes: Shared event. Gold vs Relic trade-off. The relic option is stronger but adds a curse card to your deck.

name: Whispering Hollow
description: Dead trees surround a bone-white tree with clay baubles, whispering transformation options.

choices.recommendation: Take if you have gold to spare and need potions
Good for converting weak cards — transformation can upgrade your deck

notes: Overgrowth event. Both options have costs. Card transform can be very valuable for removing starter cards.

name: Wood Carvings
description: Three wood carvings (bird, snake, torus) discovered on a pedestal requiring placement.

choices.recommendation: Good if Peck fits your character's strategy
Adds Slither enchantment to an existing card

choices.outcome: Transform 1 starter card into Toric Toughness
choices.recommendation: Good for defensive builds

notes: Overgrowth event. All three options modify your deck — choose based on which transformed card best fits your archetype.

name: Tablet Of Truth
description: Defeat Guardian Kin to access a vault containing an inscribed tablet.

choices.outcome: Lose 3 Max HP; upgrade a random card
choices.recommendation: Worth it if you can spare the Max HP — free upgrade is strong
Safe option if you need healing

notes: Overgrowth event. Trade Max HP for a card upgrade or take a big heal.

name: Self Help Book
description: A blood-stained tome on the ground: 'Top 3 Ways to Conquer the Spire.'

choices.recommendation: Best if you have a strong Power card to enchant
Good for defensive builds
Good for offensive builds

notes: Shared event. Free enchantment — choose based on which card type matters most to your deck.

name: The Future Of Potions
description: A machine that converts liquids into compressed tablets — the future of potions.

choices.outcome: Trade 1 potion for an upgraded version of that potion type
choices.recommendation: Great if you have a common potion worth upgrading

notes: Shared event in Acts 2-3. Only useful if you have a potion to sacrifice.

name: Sunken Statue
description: A half-submerged statue with a stone sword; glittering objects visible below the water.

choices.recommendation: Great gold gain if you can afford the HP

choices.outcome: Obtain the Sword of Stone relic
choices.recommendation: Take if the relic fits your build

notes: Overgrowth event. Gold vs relic choice — both options are solid.

name: Wellspring
description: A tranquil emerald wellspring with glowing motes.

choices.outcome: Remove 1 card from deck; add 1 Guilty curse
choices.recommendation: Good for removing a bad card, but the curse offsets deck thinning
Safe option — free potion with no downside

notes: Overgrowth event. Bottle is safer; Bathe is only worth it if you desperately need to remove a card.

name: Orobas
description: Ancient being who offers powerful blessings at the start of an act.

choices.outcome: Receive a unique Ancient relic or powerful effect
choices.recommendation: Evaluate each blessing based on your current build

notes: Ancient encounter — offers blessings similar to Neow but between acts. Not a standard '?' event.

name: The Lantern Key
description: A quest event involving a mysterious lantern and a key.

choices.outcome: Receive the Lantern Key quest item
choices.recommendation: Quest items can provide rewards later in the run

notes: Quest event. The Lantern Key may unlock something later.

name: Morphic Grove
description: Crystalline trees with excited Morphic creatures; one stands apart from the group.

choices.recommendation: Expensive but powerful — 2 card transforms can reshape your deck
Safe choice — free Max HP with no downside

notes: Overgrowth event. Group is high cost but high reward; Loner is free value.

name: Pael
description: Ancient being who offers powerful blessings at the start of an act.

choices.outcome: Receive a unique Ancient relic or powerful effect
choices.recommendation: Evaluate each blessing based on your current build

notes: Ancient encounter — offers blessings between acts. Not a standard '?' event.

name: Endless Conveyor
description: A shack with a multi-armed chef: 'ENDLESS FEAST — PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!' (35 Gold per item).

choices.outcome: Upgrade 1 random card in your deck
choices.recommendation: Free upgrade — always worth taking

notes: Hive event. Free card upgrade with no downside.

name: Brain Leech
description: A sharp pain — a creature has latched on and demands knowledge-sharing.

choices.recommendation: Take if the HP cost is manageable — Colorless cards can be powerful

choices.outcome: Choose 1 of 5 random cards to add to deck
choices.recommendation: Good selection pool — pick the best fit for your archetype

notes: Shared event. Both options give a card — choose based on whether you want Colorless or class cards.

name: Doll Room
description: A hidden room filled with unique dolls of varying expressions and ages.

choices.outcome: Lose 15 HP; choose 1 of 3 Doll Relics
choices.recommendation: Best selection but highest cost — only if you can afford the HP

choices.outcome: Lose 5 HP; choose 1 of 2 Doll Relics
choices.recommendation: Middle ground — decent selection at moderate cost
Free relic but no choice — take if HP is low

notes: Hive event. More HP spent = more choice over which Doll Relic you get.

name: Bugslayer
description: Encounter with a bug-hunting warrior in the Hive.

choices.recommendation: Take if your deck can handle the fight

notes: Hive event. Details may vary — Early Access content.

name: Sunken Treasury
description: A vault with 2 chests but only 1 brittle key available.

choices.recommendation: Safe, guaranteed gold
Massive gold but adds a curse — only if you can handle deck pollution

notes: Underdocks event. Classic risk/reward — the second chest is 5x the gold but adds a curse.

name: Drowning Beacon
description: A submerged beacon emitting a faint glow in the Underdocks.

choices.outcome: Risk/reward — potential relic or card gain
choices.recommendation: Evaluate based on current HP and deck state

notes: Underdocks event. Details may vary — Early Access content.

name: Lost Wisp
description: A glowing mote surrounded by deceased insects, emanating flames.

choices.outcome: Add Decay curse; obtain Lost Wisp relic
choices.recommendation: The relic can be powerful but the curse hurts deck consistency
Safe option — solid gold with no downside

notes: Hive event. Relic + curse vs safe gold — evaluate the relic's value for your build.

name: The Legends Were True
description: A pitch-dark chamber suddenly illuminated, revealing a podium with a map.

choices.recommendation: RECOMMENDED — quest items provide rewards later in the run
Only if you don't want the quest item

notes: Shared event in Act 1. The Spoils Map is generally the better pick.

name: Abyssal Baths
description: A secluded chamber with hypnotic colored pools, barnacled growths dripping fluid.

choices.recommendation: Safe healing with no risk
Better long-term — 2 Max HP is permanent, 3 damage is minor

notes: Underdocks event. Immerse is usually better since Max HP is permanent.

name: Field Of Man Sized Holes
description: A massive field with body-shaped outlines; one matches your form perfectly.

choices.outcome: Enchant a card with Perfect Fit
choices.recommendation: Unique enchantment — worth taking if you have a good target card
Deck thinning but the Normality curse limits hand plays — risky

notes: Hive event. Enter Your Hole is generally safer; Resist gives card removal but a harsh curse.

name: Aroma Of Chaos
description: A clearing with floral, decay, and unknown scents causing disorientation.

choices.recommendation: Good for replacing a weak card — transformation is random but can upgrade
Safer — guaranteed improvement to a card you choose

notes: Overgrowth event. Maintain Control is safer; Let Go is higher variance but can find strong cards.

name: Crystal Sphere
description: A mystic hut with a fortune-teller: 'Your destiny has brought you here.'

choices.recommendation: More divinations but adds a curse — only if the extra info is worth it
Safer option — gold cost only, no curse

notes: Shared event in Acts 2-3. Divination reveals upcoming map encounters.

name: Symbiote
description: A dark, ancient, amorphous polyp encountered during your travels.

choices.recommendation: Corrupted enchantment can be powerful on the right Attack
Good for replacing a weak card

notes: Shared event in Acts 2-3. Both options modify your deck — choose based on what you need.

name: Tanx
description: An encounter with a mysterious creature or challenge.

choices.recommendation: Evaluate based on current run state

notes: Undocumented event — discovered from save data. Details pending wiki documentation.

name: Punch Off
description: A physical challenge or confrontation.

choices.recommendation: Evaluate based on current run state

notes: Undocumented event — discovered from save data. Details pending wiki documentation.

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description: A dangerous whirlpool threatening to pull you under.

choices.recommendation: Evaluate based on current run state

notes: Undocumented event — discovered from save data. Likely an Underdocks event. Details pending wiki documentation.
